scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx index.ts Stage3D-ast.s3c > /tmp/_s3d_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_ast.ts Stage3D-ast.ts && npx tsx index.ts Stage3D-lower.s3c > /tmp/_s3d_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_lower.ts Stage3D-lower.ts && npx tsx index.ts Stage3D-codegen.s3c > /tmp/_s3d_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_codegen.ts Stage3D-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../3C/index.ts Stage3D.s3c > /tmp/_s3d_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s3d_main.ts index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
